description: Identify UbiB motifs, catalytic residues, and hydrophobic/TM segments
code:
import numpy as np, matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg'); import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
seq=""
print("length", len(seq))
# locate key UbiB motifs
import re
for motif,name in [("K.GQ","KxGQ UbiB signature"),("VAQVH","VAIK-analog region"),("HADMHPGN","atypical catalytic HxD...N loop"),("D.G","DFG-like")]:
    for m in re.finditer(motif,seq):
        print(name, m.group(), m.start()+1,"-",m.end())
# print residues at annotated sites
for pos in [154,289,132,133,134,135,136,137,138,139,140]:
    print("res",pos,seq[pos-1])
# Kyte-Doolittle hydropathy
kd={'A':1.8,'R':-4.5,'N':-3.5,'D':-3.5,'C':2.5,'Q':-3.5,'E':-3.5,'G':-0.4,'H':-3.2,'I':4.5,'L':3.8,'K':-3.9,'M':1.9,'F':2.8,'P':-1.6,'S':-0.8,'T':-0.7,'W':-0.9,'Y':-1.3,'V':4.2}
w=19; vals=[np.mean([kd[a] for a in seq[i:i+w]]) for i in range(len(seq)-w+1)]
x=np.arange(len(vals))+w//2+1
plt.figure(figsize=(11,3))
plt.plot(x,vals); plt.axhline(1.6,color='r',ls='--',label='TM threshold 1.6')
plt.xlabel('residue'); plt.ylabel('KD hydropathy (w=19)'); plt.legend(); plt.title('UbiB A0A140FWS4 hydropathy')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.savefig('ubiB_hydropathy.png',dpi=110)
# report peaks above 1.6
peaks=[(int(x[i]),round(vals[i],2)) for i in range(len(vals)) if vals[i]>1.6]
print("hydrophobic (>1.6) center positions:", peaks[:40])
